mapper.select: select aprvlineid, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline order by approvalid, aprvlineid
select aprvlineid, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline where approvalid= #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by approvalid, aprvlineid
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline (aprvlineid, approvalid, approvalname) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline (aprvlineid, approvalid, approvalname) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalname, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select aprvlineid, approvalid, approvalname from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline
order by approvalid, aprvlineid limit #{offset}, #{amount}
